mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REP_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO report ( REP_NO, REP_CN, REP_CLSF, CMT_NO, REG_NO ) VALUES ( #{repNo}, #{repCn}, #{repClsf}, #{cmtNo}, #{regNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT REP_NO, REP_CN, REP_CLSF, CMT_NO, REP_REG, REP_REG_HM, REG_NO, REP_PROC_DT, REP_PROC_HM, REP_STAT_YN FROM report WHERE REP_NO = #{repNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, T1.* FROM ( SELECT REP_NO, REP_CN, REP_CLSF, CMT_NO, REP_REG, REP_REG_HM, REG_NO, REP_PROC_DT, REP_PROC_HM, REP_STAT_YN FROM report WHERE 1 = 1
AND REP_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND REP_STAT_YN = #{searchWord}
ORDER BY REP_NO DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN REP_STAT_YN = 'N' THEN 1 END) as "pendingCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN REP_REG = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 1 END) as "todayCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN REP_STAT_YN = 'Y' AND REP_PROC_DT >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW'), 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 1 END) as "weekSuccessCount" FROM report

SELECT r.REP_NO AS "repNo", r.REP_CN AS "repCn", r.REP_CLSF AS "repClsf", r.REP_STAT_YN AS "repStatYn", r.REP_REG AS "repReg", c.CMT_CN AS "cmtCn", c.CMT_NO AS "cmtNo" FROM report r LEFT JOIN cmt c ON r.CMT_NO = c.CMT_NO WHERE r.REP_NO = #{repNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET REP_STAT_YN = 'Y', REP_PROC_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), REP_PROC_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI') WHERE REP_NO = #{repNo}
